text: DIFC Order No. 1 of 2009 In respect of Parts 43 and 53 of the Rules of the DIFC Courts

I, Mohammed bin Rashid Al Maktoum, Vice President of the United Arab Emirates, Prime Minister, of Dubai and President of the Dubai International Financial Centre,Ruler (/glossary/ruler/) After having reviewed;

Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the establishment of the ;DIFC (/glossary/difc/) Dubai Law No.12 of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC; DIFC Law No. 10 of 2004 in respect of the Law;DIFC Courts (/glossary/difc-courts/) DIFC Order No.1 of 2007 in respect of the of the DIFC Courts; andRules (/glossary/rules/) upon the recommendation of the ,Chief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/)
1. This Order shall be cited as ‘Order in Respect of Parts 43 and 53 of the Rules of DIFC Courts’.
2. In this Order, unless the context otherwise requires:
a. “Law” means the DIFC Courts Law No.10 of 2004; b. “Chief Justice” means the Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts; and c. “Commencement Date” means the date on which this Order is signed.

3. This Order shall be interpreted in accordance with the interpretative provisions set out at paragraphs 1 and 2 of the Schedule to and all defi ned terms, unlessthe Law (/glossary/the-law/) otherwise indicated, shall bear the same meanings as set out under paragraph 3 of the Schedule to the Law.
The Rules of the DIFC Courts

4. Upon the recommendation of the Chief Justice pursuant to Article 31 of the Law, the following new Parts of the Rules of the DIFC Courts shall be enacted to supplement those issued pursuant to DIFC Order No.1 of 2007:

a. Part 43 (/difc-courts/rules/part-43) – the appended for Arbitration rules (/glossary/rules/)   
Claims; and   
b. Part 53 (/difc-courts/rules/part-53) – the appended rules of the Small Claims   
.Tribunal (/glossary/tribunal/)
Application of the New Parts of the Rules of the DIFC Courts

5. From the Commencement Date all proceedings before the DIFC Courts must be commenced in accordance with the Rules of the DIFC Courts, which shall incorporate the appended Part 43 (/difc-courts/rules/part-43) and Part 53 (/difc-courts/rules/part-53).
6. This Order shall come into force on the Commencement Date.
President of the Dubai International Financial Centre.
Issued at 31/05/2009 Dubai Corresponding to: 1430 Hijri
